english: She who is white as jasmine, moon and snow, clad in pure white garments
roman: Ya kundendutushara hara dhavala ya shubhra vastra avrita

english: Who holds a veena and a staff of blessings, seated on a white lotus
roman: Ya veena vara danda manditakara ya shweta padmasana

english: Who is always worshipped by Brahma, Achyuta, Shankara and all the gods
roman: Ya Brahma achyuta Shankara prabhritibhir devaih sada vandita

hindi: सा मां पातु सरस्वती भगवती निःशेषजाड्यापहा॥
english: May that divine Saraswati protect me, the remover of all dullness
roman: Sa mam patu Saraswati Bhagavati nihshesha jadya paha

english: The supreme white one, essence of Brahma contemplation, the first, all-pervasive
roman: Shuklam Brahma vichara saara paramam adyam jagad vyapinim

english: Bearing veena and book, bestower of fearlessness, remover of the darkness of ignorance
roman: Veena pustaka dharini mabhayadam jad yandhakara apaham

english: Holding a crystal rosary in her hand, seated on a lotus
roman: Haste sphatika maalikam vidadhatim padmasane samsthitam

hindi: वन्दे तां परमेश्वरीं भगवतीं बुद्धिप्रदां शारदाम्॥
english: I salute that supreme Goddess, the bestower of wisdom, Sharada
roman: Vande tam Parameshvarim Bhagavatim buddhipradam Sharadam

english: This Saraswati Ashtakam — whoever reads it in the presence of Sharada
roman: Saraswat yashtakam idam yah pathet Sharada sannidhau

hindi: बुद्धिं विद्यां च लभते सर्वसिद्धिं च विन्दति॥
english: Attains intellect and learning and obtains all perfections
roman: Buddhim vidyam cha labhate sarva siddhim cha vindati
